text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The Nikkei Sho is here, and Narita<n>Taishin returns
to Nakayama<n>Racecourse once again.

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Her heart is full of apprehension—she<n>wants to run
like she did in the<n>Satsuki Sho... But what if a
repeat of<n>the Kikuka Sho occurs?

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Despite this fear, she finds her feet<n>again after
some reassuring words.
